steps.t: Axes can be found in the uruk-encampment in eastern Nan Curunír. Quickbeam asked you to gather the uruks' axes.
There are bonfires in the uruk-encampment of eastern Nan Curunír. Quickbeam asked you to throw the axes you collected into one of the bonfires in the …
Quickbeam is at his home upon the north-eastern slopes of Nan Curunír. You should tell Quickbeam that you have destroyed many of the uruks' axes.
